hero.subtitle: Precision-engineered programs for elite performance. Professional-grade coaching and data-driven insights.

howItWorks.title: From first rep to real results

step1.title: Create your free account
step1.desc: Join in seconds. Every workout on the platform is completely free — train with no paywall from day one.

step2.title: Train with elite programs
step2.desc: Follow trainer-built workouts, then go deeper with structured multi-week programs. Secure checkout, instant access to your first lesson.

step3.title: Track everything
step3.desc: Scan meals with AI, hit personalized nutrition targets and watch your progress timeline grow in your dashboard.

eliteTrainers.title: Elite Trainers
eliteTrainers.note: Ranked by performance. Every trainer is verified before publishing programs.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Every workout is free forever and programs are one-time purchases. Membership is how you back the platform and the trainers behind it.

yearly.feature3: One payment for the whole year
